text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, O ocean! What do I need to do to reach
the top of the world?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Should I stick with my original goal and go for the
Japan Cup rather than the Kikuka Sho and the
Triple Crown? Or maybe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Sei! I've got my sights set on the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, but can you keep up with me? Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at Spe and Sei! They've got even more
speed, stamina, and burning fighting spirit than
before!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Competing with my classmates could be a nice
shortcut to achieving my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But... I won't be running in the fall Classics.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? You aren't going to the Kikuka Sho? Where
are you running, then?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm going to the Mainichi Okan first.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? That's where I'm supposed to run! But
why?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There were two things that helped me decide.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The first was distance aptitude. The Kikuka Sho is
3,000 meters, which a little bit too long for me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The second is, well... There's a certain someone
I'd like to run against.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A certain someone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! Who is that?! She just flew right past us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She's fast! I can't keep up! Wait, is that—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I didn't see you. I was completely absorbed
in running.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh... what the heck?! That form!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That perfect stride! The smooth acceleration that
defies the wet sand! That's—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A silent runner whose otherworldly runaway style
leaves everyone behind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She's one of the strongest in the senior year.
She'll be running in the Mainichi Okan too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well, see you later, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! Ah... She's already gone...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Silence... Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: La primera... The number one... sky...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She's probably soaring in the highest skies right
now. Higher than me or Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to have a chat with El Condor Pasa about
her plans for the fall. I invite her friend Grass
Wonder along as well.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think I want to go to the Mainichi Okan after all.
Not the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want to run against Silence Suzuka before the
Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling today. I can tell she's the strongest
and fastest especialista at the moment!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna show everyone I'm the world's
strongest, she's the opponent I gotta beat.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know I didn't run as well as I hoped in the Derby,
but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I said I'm gonna be the strongest in the world!
Once you put that out there, you can't just take it
back!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I gotta show off what I can do before the Japan
Cup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna do that at the Mainichi Okan with
Suzuka! And Grass too!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You haven't fully bloomed yet, but I
can tell my biggest rival in the future is definitely
gonna be you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And you're my one and only best friend! I want
you to see how strong I am, up close and
personal!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's true, I am still growing... But young flowers have a certain vitality to them that those in full bloom lack.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll accept that challenge, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, what do you think, Trainer? Is going
from the Mainichi Okan to the Japan Cup going
to work?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know, but I still want to!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! Thank you so much! It's decided, then!
The condor is flying east!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her conviction burns hotter than the summer sun.
With this, El Condor Pasa decides to take on
higher altitudes than she's currently built for...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka... El Condor Pasa will essentially
be taking on an aircraft that flies in the
stratosphere at the speed of sound.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now that it's decided, I'm goin' all in! I have to
surpass Suzuka during camp!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What is Suzuka doing better than I am, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure there's more she's beating me in than just
speed! I wanna work on those points!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What does Silence Suzuka have that El Condor
Pasa is lacking? That would be...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Piercing... force! Of course! Suzuka cuts straight
through the pack right out of the gate like a hot
knife through butter!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna pierce through just like she does!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Um... El? What is digging a hole in the beach
supposed to accomplish?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm Drill Condor Pasa! I'm punching holes
just like Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? I can't get out! Trainer! Grass! Help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dug herself a hole so deep she can't get out
of it. But all of this practice digging seems to
have made her stronger, at least.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, her taciturn nature! Suzuka doesn't say
much, does she?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I can become one with nature and be as quiet
as the forest, I'm sure I can increase my focus!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ommm... Darkness. Silence. The buzzing of
insects... No problem. Heck, bring on the ghosts
and monsters even. But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aaaghhh, I gotta talk! Grass, say something!
Anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder smiles wryly. This might not have
done much for El Condor Pasa's concentration,
but her guts seem to have improved.
